---
title: "Talks"
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---

Here is where I will list my past and upcoming talks + slides.


## Research Talks


## Expository Talks



![1+1=1, as seen in Tarkovsky's movie [Nostalghia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nostalghia)](1+1=1.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}
